metadata.description: Vietnamese train-derived MFR dictionary for MultiLexNorm-style lexical normalization. High-confidence pairs are safe for direct lookup; review/ambiguous pairs should be resolved with context or an LLM detector.
metadata.source: train-00000-of-00001.parquet in the current project workspace
metadata.warning: Use paper_seed_pairs only if external resources are allowed by your assignment/task setting. They are separated from train-derived MFR to avoid accidental leakage or rule overreach.
